texts.label: text
texts.orig: Klang Valley East Metro - Package V3
texts.text: Klang Valley East Metro - Package V3

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Package V3 remains deliverable but is under increasing schedule pressure. Overall actual progress is 36.8% versus planned 39.0% , giving a schedule variance of -2.2% . Cost is currently manageable but forecast at completion has moved to RM 1.365 billion , driven mainly by Cheras North disruption, utilities diversion complexity, and prolonged interface coordination.
texts.text: Package V3 remains deliverable but is under increasing schedule pressure. Overall actual progress is 36.8% versus planned 39.0% , giving a schedule variance of -2.2% . Cost is currently manageable but forecast at completion has moved to RM 1.365 billion , driven mainly by Cheras North disruption, utilities diversion complexity, and prolonged interface coordination.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Schedule slippage widened from -1.3% at end-February to -2.2% in mid-March.
texts.text: Schedule slippage widened from -1.3% at end-February to -2.2% in mid-March.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Utility diversion completion for the Cheras North corridor has not yet been fully secured.
texts.text: Utility diversion completion for the Cheras North corridor has not yet been fully secured.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Interface design freeze was not achieved in full by end-March as originally targeted.
texts.text: Interface design freeze was not achieved in full by end-March as originally targeted.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Forecast at completion increased from RM 1.352 billion to RM 1.365 billion .
texts.text: Forecast at completion increased from RM 1.352 billion to RM 1.365 billion .

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Core viaduct production remains broadly recoverable if supply and weather stabilise.
texts.text: Core viaduct production remains broadly recoverable if supply and weather stabilise.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Pandan Gateway Station is only marginally behind target.
texts.text: Pandan Gateway Station is only marginally behind target.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Safety performance remains stable and no major quality trend has emerged.
texts.text: Safety performance remains stable and no major quality trend has emerged.

texts.text: VO-019 : utility diversion and protection scope

texts.text: VO-021 : Cheras North redesign and sequence disruption

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Cheras North redesign and disrupted access sequencing
texts.text: Cheras North redesign and disrupted access sequencing

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: extended preliminaries from recovery working windows
texts.text: extended preliminaries from recovery working windows

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Approve additional recovery budget for targeted night-shift and weekend operations through April.
texts.text: Approve additional recovery budget for targeted night-shift and weekend operations through April.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Endorse alternate precast supply route if the current supplier misses the revised weekly output commitment.
texts.text: Endorse alternate precast supply route if the current supplier misses the revised weekly output commitment.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. Escalate unresolved diversion approval through the employer and relevant authority leadership.
texts.text: Escalate unresolved diversion approval through the employer and relevant authority leadership.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The project team believes the package can still be recovered without a major baseline reset if March and April actions are implemented decisively. However, if utility diversion approval and interface sign-off remain partial into April, the delay risk will likely shift from recoverable to structural.
texts.text: The project team believes the package can still be recovered without a major baseline reset if March and April actions are implemented decisively. However, if utility diversion approval and interface sign-off remain partial into April, the delay risk will likely shift from recoverable to structural.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Quality closeout records for NCR-014 are still being reconciled between site and QA logs.
texts.text: Quality closeout records for NCR-014 are still being reconciled between site and QA logs.

table_cells.text: Delay concentrated in utilities, Cheras North, and interface-related access handover

No LTI; near-miss actions being tracked
No systemic defect trend, but closeout discipline needs strengthening
Escalation is needed to resolve the diversion approval bottleneck
